data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of easy cancellation of a single occurrence, but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the ability to cancel a single occurrence, yet there is no direct evidence or API checks provided that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or operational. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary checks to validate this specific need are absent.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of easy cancellation of a single occurrence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add cancellation functionality validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a booking can be canceled easily by the customer.
